narrative:
Perry Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,128 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
